description: Render confirmation prompts as themed panels. The actual user input loop lives in `saf-08`; this helper only renders the prompt text and warning context.
notes: Render-only; do not call `Read-Host` here. That happens in `saf-08`.
steps: TDD: Standard prompt shows the y/N hint.
TDD: High-risk prompt shows the EXECUTE token requirement.
TDD: Package install prompt shows INSTALL token.
TDD: Cloud prompt shows CLOUD token.
TDD: Pull prompt shows PULL token.
Author `Private/UI/Write-SlashOpsConfirm.ps1` taking `(Kind, Reason)` and dispatching to FxConsole panel calls.
Tests stub FxConsole and assert prompt content.
name: [ui-04] Confirmation prompts (themed)
